description_long: This is a modern, semi-automatic rifle with a matte black finish, featuring a fixed synthetic stock and a prominent pistol grip. The rifle has a long, slender barrel with a flash hider at the muzzle, and a detachable box magazine inserted in front of the trigger guard. The upper receiver is equipped with standard iron sights, and the handguard is ribbed for improved grip. The overall design is streamlined and utilitarian, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functionality. The materials appear to be a combination of metal for the barrel and receiver, and polymer for the stock, grip, and handguard.
description: A matte black, semi-automatic rifle with a fixed synthetic stock, long barrel, detachable box magazine, and iron sights. The design is streamlined and functional, with metal and polymer construction.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the flash hider and the narrow profile of the barrel and handguard.
description_view_1: A full side view reveals the fixed stock, pistol grip, detachable magazine, ribbed handguard, and iron sights along the top.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the buttstock and the alignment of the barrel, with the magazine and grip partially visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the same features from the other side, including the stock, magazine, and handguard.
